stories.title: LeBron Watch — Decision Week Begins, Heat and Warriors Lead the Pack

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The pitches are done. The meetings are over.

LeBron James has heard from every team. Now he decides.

Heat and Warriors lead the field — but nothing is final. Decision expected THIS WEEK.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Rich Paul spoke to 27 teams.

LeBron said no to the Lakers.

Now it's Heat vs. Warriors as the top 2 contenders — and his decision comes this week.

#LeBron #NBAFreeAgency #NBA

article.headline: Decision Week: LeBron James Narrows to Heat and Warriors as Announcement Looms

stories.title: Summer League Championship Tonight — Grizzlies vs. Warriors, 9 PM ET on ESPN

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Summer League Championship TONIGHT.

Warriors stunned the Lakers 92-88 in the semis.
Grizzlies held off the Rockets.

Now they meet for the title — 9:00 PM ET on ESPN.

#SummerLeague #NBA #DubNation #GrindCity

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Yaxel Lendeborg. Cedric Coward. Cameron Boozer.

The NBA's future is on the court tonight.

Grizzlies vs. Warriors — Summer League Championship — 9:00 PM ET on ESPN.

#SummerLeague #NBA #GrindCity #DubNation

stories.title: Cedric Coward's 28-Point Semifinal — The No. 11 Pick Announces Himself

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
28 points. 6 rebounds. 5 assists. 4 threes.

Cedric Coward put up that line in the Summer League semifinals — and the Grizzlies are in the championship game tonight.

The No. 11 pick is ready. 👀

#GrindCity #SummerLeague #NBA

article.headline: Cedric Coward Just Had the Summer League Performance of the Year

stories.title: Kawhi Investigation Still Weeks Away — Raptors Stuck in Limbo

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard investigation just expanded AGAIN.

Now a second undisclosed endorsement deal is under the microscope.

Still weeks from a conclusion. Raptors trade still frozen. No timeline.

#Raptors #NBA #KawhiLeonard

stories.title: The New-Look NBA — How the Blockbuster Trades Reshape the League

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The trades are official. The new NBA is here.

Giannis in Miami. Paul George in Boston. Jaylen Brown in Philly. Ja in Portland. LaMelo in Minnesota.

One question remains: where does LeBron land?

#NBA #NBAFreeAgency
